# Nisan Cable TV & Internet — Bilimora, Gujarat, India

> Bilimora's local ISP and cable TV provider since 1993. FTTH fiber internet from ₹4,999/year (50–400 Mbps). Serving 2,000+ homes and businesses in Bilimora West (W Zone), Gujarat.

## About

Nisan Cable & Internet is a locally-founded business in Bilimora, Gujarat, India. It offers FTTH (fiber to the home) internet and cable TV services exclusively in Bilimora West. Unlike national ISPs (Jio, Airtel), Nisan is built for Bilimora — local technicians, same-day support, and plans priced 40–55% below national competitors.

- Founded: 1993 (originally as a cable TV provider)
- Service area: Bilimora West (W Zone), Gujarat, India – PIN 396321
- Google rating: 4.9 stars from local customers
- Customers: 2,000+ households and businesses

## Services

- FTTH Fiber Internet: 50 Mbps (₹4,999/yr), 100 Mbps (₹5,999/yr), 200 Mbps (₹7,499/yr), 300 Mbps (₹8,999/yr), 400 Mbps (₹11,499/yr)
- Cable TV: Gujarati, Hindi, sports, kids channels
- Free installation on every plan
- Free WiFi router included
- 1-month money-back guarantee

## Contact

- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 98251 52400
- Email: hello@nisan.co.in
- Address: Morden Radio, Opp. Laxmi Palace, Station Road, Bilimora-396321, Gujarat
